chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2188 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of M.A No. 9283/25. For hearing of main case. 27.01.2026. Mr. Zubair Junejo, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G, Sindh alongwith SIP / I.O Muhammad Nawaz Tarar from PS Sohrab Goth, District Karachi East. ***************************************** Petitioners are present along with their counsel. Petitioner No.1 once again has categorically made a statement before this Court that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 on her own freewill and choice without any pressure or coercion. She has further stated that neither she has been kidnapped nor abducted as alleged in the FIR bearing Crime No.785 of 2025 under Section 365-B PPC r/w Section 3 Prevention of Trafficking in Persons Act, 2018 of Police Station Sohrab Goth, District East Karachi. Today I.O of the case is present in Court and has recorded the Statement under Section 161 Cr.P.C of Petitioner No.1 (Mst. Muskan) wherein she has reiterated the facts as stated hereinabove. I.O states that he shall file report before the concerned Magistrate under Section 173 Cr.P.C. He shall do so within seven days from today. The concerned Magistrate shall pass orders in accordance with law on the report so submitted by the I.O. As far as the grievance of the private respondents, if any, is concerned, they are at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of their grievance, if so advised. In the meantime, legal protection shall be provided to the petitioners as and when required.

As far as the grievance of the private respondents, if any, is concerned, they are at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of their grievance, if so advised. In the meantime, legal protection shall be provided to the petitioners as and when required. This Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
